_notes: Seed the flow's vector store by submitting these tickets IN ORDER (T-1001 first) through the demo app or directly via the flow trigger. T-1005, T-1007, and T-1011 form a genuine cluster (same SFTP/TLS handshake root cause as T-1013). T-1009 is a decoy — surface-similar wording ('failing', 'connection') but a self-inflicted IdP issue, not a real match. T-1017 (added separately, see below) is a second decoy: an expired API key, worded similarly to the SFTP cluster but a different, self-inflicted root cause.

tickets.subject: How do I add a second admin seat?
tickets.body: We need to give our ops lead admin access alongside me. Where do I do that in settings?

tickets.subject: Invoice shows wrong seat count
tickets.body: This month's invoice says 42 seats but we only have 37 active users. Can someone check?

tickets.subject: Nightly file sync failing since this morning
tickets.body: Our overnight SFTP drop to your ingestion folder has been failing since around 8am. Getting connection timeouts on our end when the scheduled job tries to push the file.

tickets.subject: Can't find the export button
tickets.body: New user here - trying to export a report to CSV and I don't see the option anywhere on the reports page.

tickets.subject: SFTP integration throwing handshake errors
tickets.body: Our integration team says the nightly feed to your platform has been bouncing since late morning - handshake failed, TLS error on our side. Nothing changed in our config recently.

tickets.subject: Notification emails going to spam
tickets.body: Several of our users say the daily digest emails are landing in spam. Any recent changes to the sending domain?

tickets.subject: File upload job stuck, no data since morning
tickets.body: We push a batch file every night around 6am our time and it usually shows up processed by 7. Today nothing came through - our side logs show the connection resetting partway through the transfer.

tickets.subject: Feature request: dark mode
tickets.body: A few of our analysts would love a dark mode option for the dashboard, especially for night shift staff.

tickets.subject: SSO login failing for our whole team
tickets.body: Nobody can log in via SSO this morning. Getting an 'identity provider unreachable' message. We haven't touched our IdP config.

tickets.subject: Where do I change my timezone?
tickets.body: Reports are showing times an hour off from what I expect. Is there a timezone setting somewhere?

tickets.subject: Data feed sync failed, cert error on our end
tickets.body: Our integration engineer flagged that the certificate presented during the file transfer handshake this morning looked different than usual, and now the transfer fails outright. This started roughly 6 hours ago.

tickets.subject: Can we get a custom report template?
tickets.body: Would like to set up a saved report template with our own column ordering. Is that possible?

tickets.subject: Integration down since this afternoon, TLS mismatch
tickets.body: Our nightly ETL job (runs mid-afternoon for us due to timezone) failed with a TLS handshake mismatch against your SFTP endpoint. No changes on our side in weeks.

tickets.subject: Our expired API key is rejecting requests
tickets.body: We're getting 401s on our nightly job - looks like our API key expired last week and we forgot to rotate it. Can you confirm and help us regenerate?
